title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Palpitation
description: Lavandula angustifolia tinctures contains bioactive constituents such as linalool and linalyl acetate, which are responsible for its calming effects. These compounds interact with the body's nervous system to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The sedative properties of linalool help to slow down heart rate and lower blood pressure, which can alleviate palpitations caused by stress and anxiety.
